name: LINGUAL THYROID
definition: solid embryonic rest of thyroid tissue, which remains ectopic along the tract of thyroglossal

demographics.Frequency: in 10% of autopsies (within tongue < 3 mm); M << F

dominant_finding: small hyperattenuating focus relative to muscle ← iodine content + moderate contrast
discriminating_features: small hyperattenuating focus relative to muscle ← iodine content + moderate contrast
solid avidly enhancing lesion mildly T1 hyper- / isointense relative to muscle

CT: small hyperattenuating focus relative to muscle ← iodine content + moderate contrast
MR: solid avidly enhancing lesion mildly T1 hyper- / isointense relative to muscle

resection of ectopic thyroid will render patient athyroid
